info.name: Grimoire
info.summary: A self-hosted virtual tabletop for D&D and other TTRPGs
info.description:
Grimoire is a virtual tabletop (VTT) built into Nextcloud. Run campaigns and live sessions with shared 2D battlemaps and a physics-driven 3D mode where you can load glTF character models and build maps in three dimensions.
Features - Campaigns and scenes, stored in your own Nextcloud - 2D mode: maps, tokens, drawings, fog of war, grid - 3D mode: glTF/GLB models, 3D map building, orbit camera - Physics 3D dice (d4–d20) with real settle-and-read results - Tools: pointer, grab, measurement, area-of-effect templates - Real-time multiplayer rooms - Addon/extension system so the table can be extended over time
info.author: Roboman124
